UG-125  PRESSURE RELIEF DEVICES. (a) All pressure vessels within the scope of this Division shall be provided with pressure relief devices in accordance with this paragraph. (b) The set pressure of the relief device shall not exceed the maximum allowable working pressure determined from the design formulas of UG-27 and UG-23. (c) Vessels protected by pressure relief devices shall be designed for the loads specified in UG-22. Relief devices shall be tested as required by UG-99. For pneumatic test safety, see also UG-100. Marking of relief devices shall be in accordance with UG-116. Installation details shall comply with the requirements of this paragraph, subject to the approval of the Inspector per UG-93.
